texto: Rejecting Jesus Christ is like a fugitive who spends all day running but has nowhere to hide
autor: you will face him after death. He is the only judge and jury.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you will face him after death. He is the only judge and jury.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Rejecting Jesus Christ is like a fugitive who spends all day running but has nowhere to hide” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, felix-wantang, rejecting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
